name: Nothing Ear (2)
confidenceReason: AutoEq contains direct Nothing ear (2) measurements from Super Review and RTINGS HMS II.3.
notes: Ear (2) is commonly described as controlled and extended in bass with assertive top-end energy. Be conservative from 4 kHz upward.
defaultBassEnhance: Off; level 1 only for bass-light tracks
knownRisks: sibilance if band 7 is boosted too much
